nodes.label: Android Chrome App Icon (512x512)
nodes.description: 512x512 PNG app icon for Android Chrome PWA. Dark navy background (~#021a22) with a glowing cyan/teal cross or plus-sign shape (~#00d4c8) centered with a soft neon glow/blur effect. Iconography evokes health, habit-tracking, or wellness themes. Modern neon aesthetic.

nodes.label: Teal/Neon Design Language
nodes.description: Dark navy background with glowing cyan/teal accent color used as the app visual theme.

nodes.label: Cross / Plus-Sign Iconography
nodes.description: A glowing cross or plus-sign shape used as the central icon motif, symbolizing health, addition, or positive habit formation.

nodes.label: Apple Touch Icon (PWA App Icon)
nodes.description: 180x180 PNG app icon used for iOS home screen / PWA installation. Dark navy (#0a1a2a) background with a central glowing teal/cyan (#00c8c8) graphic depicting a stylized habit-tracker dashboard or checklist UI вЂ” horizontal bars with a small icon above, evoking progress rows or a habit list. The luminous glow effect gives a modern, tech-minimal aesthetic consistent with the app's teal-on-dark color palette.
nodes.iconography: stylized checklist / dashboard rows with glow effect
nodes.represents: HabitTracker web app identity / PWA touchpoint

nodes.label: Teal-on-Dark Color Palette
nodes.description: The app's visual identity uses a dark navy background (#0a1a2a) with glowing teal/cyan accents (#00c8c8). Consistent across icon and likely the frontend UI.

nodes.label: Favicon 16x16
nodes.description: A 16x16 pixel favicon for the HabitTracker web app. Displays a small teal/cyan icon on a dark background, visually representing a checkmark or habit-completion symbol consistent with a habit tracking application. Used as the browser tab icon.

nodes.label: App Favicon (32x32)
nodes.description: 32x32 PNG favicon for the HabitTracker web app. Dark circular/rounded background with a glowing teal/cyan icon element at the center, representing the app brand mark displayed in browser tabs.

nodes.label: HabitTracker Brand Identity
nodes.description: Visual brand identity of the HabitTracker application вЂ” dark theme with teal/cyan accent color, reflecting the app's color scheme.

nodes.label: Static Assets Directory
nodes.description: Spring Boot static resources directory serving CSS, JS, images, and other frontend assets for the HabitTracker web app.
